---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Larjango
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Problem or Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it useful?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature could work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions?

## Related Area

Which part of the Larjango three-process workflow does this relate to?

- [ ] Plan
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Review & Deploy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Community
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, links, or notes if helpful.
